r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Weight loss requires strict dieting and exercise
emotional_amplifiers: This allows people to eat the foods they want and always seem to be craving because they'll just want to eat less.
You can eat what you want - you'll just want less of it
specificity_elements: Participants in clinical study lost an average of 5 times more weight without additional exercise or diets; 48-hour time limit now in place

unique_differentiators: Take a pill, eat what you want, lose 400% more weight

f_freedom_promise.primary_transformation: Eat foods you crave, just want less, lose 400% more weight than placebo

headline.primary_headline: Sales are booming for clinical strength diet pill
headline.subheadline: Participants in clinical study lost an average of 5 times more weight without additional exercise or diets; 48-hour time limit now in place
headline.promise_compression: Clinically proven diet pill with 400% better results and massive demand

curiosity_architecture.incomplete_pattern: What is this diet pill everyone is buying?

schema_analysis.existing_schema: Diet pills don't work or require diet and exercise
schema_analysis.new_schema: This pill works 400% better WITHOUT diet or exercise changes
schema_analysis.bridge_mechanism: Clinical trial showing 5x weight loss + 100% participant results

headline.vsl_adaptation: Over 10 million doses shipped... clinical trials showing 400% more weight loss WITHOUT diet or exercise... and 100% of participants got results

lead.opening_verbatim: (UMS) - Over 10 million doses have been shipped to dieters so far, and sales continue to climb every day for the diet supplement called Apatrim. 'We knew we had a great product, but it's even exceeded our expectations,' said Ken Geis, Manager of Call Center Operations for PatentHEALTH the company that developed the clinically tested weight loss supplement.
lead.hook_mechanism: Massive sales volume as proof of effectiveness
lead.transition_to_body: But a closer look at this weight loss sensation suggests that maybe the company shouldn't have been caught off guard by its success.

mechanism.mechanism_description: Apatrim comes from a natural edible plant source with a known ability to help control hunger pangs. By suppressing appetite, people consume fewer calories which leads to weight loss - allowing them to eat the foods they want, they'll just want to eat less.
mechanism.mechanism_verbatim: By suppressing their appetite, most people will consume fewer calories which can lead to weight loss.
mechanism.us_patent: #7,060,308 - protects proprietary method of extracting the active ingredient

proof_elements.verbatim: lost an average of 400% more weight than those taking a placebo
a remarkable 100% of the participants taking Apatrim as directed either lost weight or inches off of their waistline
Over 10 million doses have been shipped to dieters so far
Mark Loy, a personal trainer has had some of his clients use Apatrim with great success... 'Sign me up, I'm a believer.'

key_sections.content_verbatim: Participants taking Apatrim's active ingredient as directed lost an average of 400% more weight than those taking a placebo during the 4-week U.S. clinical study. These remarkable results were achieved without additional exercise or diets.

While we all know that no diet pill works for everyone, a remarkable 100% of the participants taking Apatrim as directed either lost weight or inches off of their waistline during the 4 week clinical study.

Mark Loy, a personal trainer has had some of his clients use Apatrim with great success. 'When I'm working with my clients I can control what they're eating,' said Loy. 'But when they leave they're on their own and that's when the tendency to cheat comes into play.'

narrative_flow.best_results: Some participants experienced fabulous results, losing as much as 8 lbs and up to 2 inches off their waistline.

offer.urgency_mechanism: 48-hour time limit for Regional Health Hotline discount
offer.cta: Call 1-866-964-2349 and ask for Dept. AP7171

metadata.source_file: Sales are booming for clinical strength diet pill 2009-2011 (4 Stars).md

fssit_candidates.description: You can eat what you want - you'll just want less of it
fssit_candidates.verbatim: This allows people to eat the foods they want and always seem to be craving because they'll just want to eat less.

schema_analysis.from_belief: Weight loss requires strict dieting and exercise
schema_analysis.to_belief: Take a pill, eat what you want, lose 400% more weight

richs_formula_elements.old_way: Strict diets, constant exercise, willpower battles with cravings
richs_formula_elements.new_discovery: Natural plant compound suppresses appetite from within
richs_formula_elements.new_possibility: Eat foods you crave, just want less, lose 400% more weight than placebo

persuasion_elements: No additional diet or exercise required
format_innovations: Photo with real people holding product

extraction_notes.quality_assessment: Strong demand-proof advertising with exceptional clinical multiplier claims
notable_elements: PatentHEALTH, LLC - same company as Trigosamine
Personal trainer Mark Loy disclosed as remunerated consultant
The 400% claim is extremely compelling math
File also contains Trigosamine ad (different layout version)
extraction_notes.modern_adaptation_potential: High - the multiplier result claim format works across media
extraction_notes.key_insight: The 400% (5x) multiplier is more memorable than absolute numbers - 'lost 4 pounds vs placebo' is less compelling than '400% more weight loss'
extraction_notes.ethical_note: Clinical study only 26 participants over 4 weeks - small sample size for bold claims
